mapper.select: select perms from sys_user_role sur inner join sys_role sr on sur.role_id = sr.role_id inner join sys_role_menu srm on srm.role_id = sr.role_id inner join sys_menu sm on sm.menu_id = srm.menu_id where sur.user_id =#{userId} and sr.status = 0 and sr.deleted = 0 and sm.status = 0 and sm.perms is not null and sm.perms != '';
select perms from sys_menu where status = 0 and perms is not null and perms != '';

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.order_num, m.path, m.component, m.`query`, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.visible, m.status, m.perms, m.icon, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join sys_role ro on ro.role_id = rm.role_id left join sys_user_role sur on rm.role_id = sur.role_id where sur.user_id = #{userId} and m.menu_type in ('M','C') and m.status = '0' and ro.status = '0' and ro.deleted = '0' order by m.parent_id,m.order_num;
select from sys_menu where menu_type in ('M','C') and status = '0' order by parent_id , order_num
